Interface ISpatialDispatchLayout

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control the Spatial Dispatch layout.

[Guid("83B10D3F-C93A-4C2B-913B-8AE1815A0298")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISpatialDispatchLayout : INetworkDiagramLayout

Properties

IsActive 

bool IsActive { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

MaximumShiftFactor

Indicates the maximum value used to increase the diagram junctions' displacement for junctions that are very close together. The greater the shift factor, the larger the separation between the diagram junctions that almost overlap.

double MaximumShiftFactor { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Name 

string Name { get; }

Property Value

string

NumberOfIterations

Indicates the number of Spatial Dispatch layout iterations executed before the final result is shown.

int NumberOfIterations { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

PreserveContainers 

bool PreserveContainers { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

IPropertySet PropertySet { get; }

IPropertySet

Version 

int Version { get; }

Property Value

int
